summary: Backend-only testing of CourtBound Phase 3 Supabase rewrite. All 13 tests passed covering all 11 requested features.
critical_code_review_comments: colleges/compare endpoint requires auth (get_current_user dependency) - this means unauthenticated users cannot compare colleges. This is by design but worth noting.

Admin stats references 'last_active' and 'subscription_tier' columns on users table and 'college_reports' table - these may need Supabase migration if not present (agent_context noted this). Core stats (total_users, total_emails, total_tracked) still return correctly.
Admin settings endpoint falls back to {key: 'global', show_european: True} if app_settings table is empty - graceful degradation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core backend endpoints working. Supabase rewrite is functional. 977 college records in DB. Admin auth via admin_sessions table with 'token' column works correctly. College data includes embedded coaches(*). Some optional columns (last_active, subscription_tier, call_notes, application_deadline, signing_day, outcome, email_templates) may need Supabase migration SQL.
